title: ‘Supergirl’ Review - by Sonny Bunch - The Bulwark
description: Hitchhiker’s slog through the universe.

title: 'Supergirl' is a grim, violent, and depressing superhero movie
description: A drunk, depressed young woman fights personal demons and an interstellar sex trafficking gang. Isn’t this supposed to be fun?

title: Amazon seller reveals rare glimpse of shadow bribery market – The Mercury News
description: Middlemen lurking on message apps like WeChat offer access to company employees they say can grant favors for a price.

title: How a seemingly harmless image can jailbreak AI
description: Florida International University researchers developed a technique called JaiLIP that uses nearly invisible image modifications to bypass AI safety guardrails and trigger responses
